creator: christer.edwards@gmail.com
text:
It is correct that 0.17.1 was recently released and we should jump directly
there. It includes a number of critical bug fixes. I've been busy at
$day_job and haven't had time to work on the port unfortunately. I'd be
happy to have some help with this release. You can close the request for
0.17.0.


On Wed, Oct 23, 2013 at 9:00 PM, Kubilay Kocak <koobs.freebsd@gmail.com>wrote:

> Thanks Mike, I can close on maintainers (or submitters) request
>
